entity.summary: Hyperliquid L1 decentralized exchange application with a dedicated wallet-connected swap surface and independently indexed DEX identity.
entity.notes: Current first-party HyperBrick website and swap route are reachable. DefiLlama candidate data independently identifies HyperBrick as a DEX on Hyperliquid L1. Confidence is medium because detailed public protocol documentation is thin.

evidence.title: HyperBrick official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party HyperBrick domain remains reachable and serves the protocol application shell.

evidence.title: HyperBrick swap application
evidence.notes: Current first-party swap route is reachable as the dedicated exchange surface.

evidence.title: HyperBrick DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus identifies HyperBrick as a decentralized exchange on Hyperliquid L1, corroborating the current first-party application.
